claims.subject: Sovereign Human at Position Zero
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate that no single sovereign human anchors the system — i.e., that outputs carry no structural human signature distinguishable from generic AI output.

claims.subject: Membrane Principle
claims.formula: Language is lossy compression, not the world. Consciousness cannot be extracted.
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate full extraction of a human's private reality into machine-verifiable form.

claims.subject: ZKPC
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate that an unanchored AI can produce output with equivalent multi-dimensional structural coherence to anchored arifOS output.

claims.subject: Personal AGI
claims.reasoning: AGI that serves all humans serves the model-maker's reality by default. True AGI must be anchored on a specific human's reality, language, beliefs, and moral architecture.
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate a system that serves all humans equally without defaulting to any single reality framework.

claims.subject: Gödel Lock
claims.formula: No closed formal system can prove all truths within itself. The human at /000 provides the external vantage point.
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate a closed AI system that can fully self-verify without any external vantage point.
